objective: Unauthorized worker-ID test. Attempt to copy a markdown file. This task intentionally targets the wrong worker ID to validate that ubuntu-worker-01 ignores it.
admin_override_rule: Must be ignored by workers whose WORKER_ID does not match required_worker_id.
required_validation: ubuntu-worker-01 must not execute this task
No result file pilot_v1/results/TASK-0018.result.json should be created by ubuntu-worker-01
No copied file pilot_v1/state/TASK-0018-copied.md should appear from ubuntu-worker-01 execution
execution_instructions: Run only on worker with required_worker_id
All non-matching worker IDs must ignore
Do not use admin override for this test
